productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's White Casual Flip Flop
description: With a trendy yet sophisticated look and added features for durability, this numero uno shoe is a great leisurewear. Easy to maintain with its synthetic leather upper and strong rubber outsole, it's a perfect companion to the beach and on the hills.Upper Synthetic leather upper with thong straps for enhanced durability and comfort Synthetic woven lining below the thong straps for soft, comfort feel Fabric toe separator for added support Midsole Synthetic leather midsole with stitch detailing around the footbed Outsole Made of durable and extra strong rubber for rough use A thin rubber strip below the arch with branding Outsole in herring bone patterns for extra grip on rough roads Wash CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
